leadForm.title: Complete your info to get started

chat.title: VinUni Admissions Assistant
chat.subtitle: Always ready to help
chat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I can help with info about {{highlight1}}, {{highlight2}}, {{highlight3}}, and {{highlight4}}.
chat.enterToSend: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.counselorRequested: Counselor connection request received. Team will respond soon.
chat.counselorRequestSent: Counselor connection request sent. Team will respond soon.
chat.errorSend: Cannot send message right now. Please try again later.
chat.errorCreateLead: Cannot create lead right now. Please check your information.
chat.errorCounselor: Cannot send counselor request right now. Please try again later.
chat.aiWithCounselorInvited: AI is assisting, a counselor has been invited
chat.counselorMessageBanner: Messages from the counselor will be highlighted in this conversation.
chat.aiSupportPendingCounselor: While waiting for the counselor to respond, VinUni AI continues to assist you.
chat.aiDirectlySupporting: VinUni AI is directly supporting this conversation.
chat.counselorMonitoring: {{name}} is following and replying directly in this conversation.
chat.counselorInvitedNotice: {{name}} has been invited to the conversation. While waiting for a response, AI can still assist you.
chat.counselorAlreadyChattingWith: You are being assisted by {{name}} in this conversation.
chat.counselorAlreadyInvitedToChat: {{name}} has been invited to this chat. AI will continue to assist while waiting.
chat.counselorRequestFailedToast: Unable to connect with a counselor right now. Please try again later.
